info.title: ThinkOnErp API - Full Traceability System
info.description:
# ThinkOnErp Enterprise Resource Planning API

## Overview
Enterprise Resource Planning API with comprehensive audit logging, request tracing, and compliance monitoring capabilities.

## Features
- **Full Audit Trail**: Complete tracking of all data modifications, authentication events, and API requests
- **Compliance Reporting**: GDPR, SOX, and ISO 27001 compliance reports
- **Performance Monitoring**: Real-time system health, performance metrics, and slow query detection
- **Security Monitoring**: Threat detection, failed login tracking, and anomaly detection
- **Alert Management**: Configurable alert rules with multiple notification channels (email, webhook, SMS)

## Authentication
All endpoints (except health checks) require JWT Bearer authentication. Use the `/api/auth/login` endpoint to obtain a token.

## Authorization
- **Admin-Only Endpoints**: Audit logs, compliance reports, monitoring, and alerts require admin privileges
- **Multi-Tenant Access**: All data access is automatically filtered by user's company and branch permissions

## Audit Trail API
The audit trail system provides comprehensive logging and monitoring:
- **AuditLogs**: Query audit logs, view entity history, trace requests by correlation ID
- **Compliance**: Generate GDPR, SOX, and ISO 27001 compliance reports
- **Monitoring**: System health, performance metrics, memory usage, security threats
- **Alerts**: Configure alert rules, view alert history, acknowledge and resolve alerts

## Rate Limiting
API requests are subject to rate limiting to prevent abuse. Failed login attempts are tracked and blocked after 5 attempts within 5 minutes.

## Support
For API support, contact the development team or refer to the comprehensive documentation at /swagger.

get.summary:
Get detailed metrics about the audit logging system.
Requires admin authorization.

Get the health status of the audit logging system.
Returns 200 OK if healthy, 503 Service Unavailable if unhealthy.
This endpoint does NOT block API requests - it only reports status.
get.description:
Health check includes:
- Background processing task status
- Circuit breaker state
- Queue depth and capacity
- Database connectivity

Even if this endpoint returns unhealthy, the API continues to operate normally.
Audit events are queued and will be processed when the system recovers.

post.summary:

get.summary: Basic health check endpoint.

post.summary: Rotates the encryption key and returns the new version identifier.
Rotates the signing key and returns the new version identifier.

get.summary: Get the current audit queue depth.
get.description:
Returns the number of audit events currently queued for processing.
High queue depth may indicate:
- Database performance issues
- High system load
- Need for backpressure application

get.summary: Get audit logging fallback status.
get.description:
Returns information about fallback file storage including:
- Whether fallback is currently active
- Number of pending fallback files
- Oldest file timestamp
- Total pending events estimate
- Fallback directory path

get.summary: Get comprehensive audit logging system metrics.
get.description:
Returns detailed metrics about the audit logging system including:
- Queue depth and capacity
- Circuit breaker state
- Success/failure rates
- Pending fallback files
- Processing status

Use this endpoint to monitor audit logging health and detect issues.

get.summary: Get comprehensive system health metrics including CPU, memory, and database connections.
get.description:
Returns detailed health information about the system including:
- CPU utilization
- Memory usage and GC statistics
- Database connection pool status
- Request rate and error rate
- Audit queue depth
- Individual health checks for each subsystem

get.summary: Get detailed memory usage metrics including heap sizes and GC statistics.
get.description:
Returns comprehensive memory information including:
- Total allocated and available memory
- Generation heap sizes (Gen0, Gen1, Gen2, LOH)
- GC collection counts and frequency
- Memory allocation rate
- Memory pressure indicators
- Optimization recommendations

get.summary: Detect current memory pressure level and get recommendations.
get.description:
Analyzes current memory usage and returns:
- Memory pressure severity (None, Low, Moderate, High, Critical)
- Pressure level percentage (0-100)
- Description of the current situation
- Actionable recommendations to reduce memory pressure
- Whether immediate action is required

get.summary: Get memory optimization recommendations based on current usage patterns.
get.description:
Analyzes memory usage patterns and provides specific recommendations such as:
- Garbage collection strategies
- Object pooling opportunities
- Heap fragmentation mitigation
- Large object allocation optimization

get.summary: Get detailed Oracle connection pool metrics.
get.description:
Returns comprehensive connection pool information including:
- Active and idle connection counts
- Pool size configuration (min/max)
- Connection timeout settings
- Pool utilization percentage
- Health status and recommendations

Requires SELECT privilege on V$SESSION for real-time statistics.
Falls back to configuration-only metrics if privileges are insufficient.

get.summary: Get performance statistics for a specific endpoint over a time period.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: The endpoint path to get statistics for

get.summary: Get slow database queries that exceeded the specified execution time threshold.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 50, max: 100)

get.summary: Get slow requests that exceeded the specified execution time threshold.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 50, max: 100)

get.summary: Detect anomalous activity for a specific user.
get.description:
Checks for unusual patterns such as:
- Unusually high API request volumes
- Requests at unusual times (outside normal working hours)
- Rapid succession of different operations
- Geographic anomalies (requests from unusual locations)

Returns a SecurityThreat if anomalous activity is detected.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to check for anomalous activity

404.description: Not Found

get.summary: Check for failed login patterns from a specific IP address.
get.description:
Checks if the specified IP address has exceeded the failed login threshold
within the configured time window. Returns a SecurityThreat if detected.

Uses Redis sliding window for distributed tracking when available,
falls back to database queries.

parameters.name: ipAddress
parameters.description: IP address to check for failed login patterns

404.description: Not Found

get.summary: Generate a daily security summary report for a specific date.
get.description:
Returns a comprehensive security summary including:
- Total threat count by type and severity
- Top threat sources (IP addresses)
- Resolution statistics
- Trend analysis compared to previous day

Used for daily security monitoring and trend analysis.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date to generate the summary report for (default: today)

get.summary: Get the count of failed login attempts for a specific user.
get.description:
Returns the count of failed login attempts for the specified user
within the configured time window (typically 5 minutes).

Supports per-user rate limiting in addition to per-IP rate limiting.
Uses Redis sliding window when available, falls back to database.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Username to check for failed login attempts

get.summary: Get all active security threats that have not been resolved.
get.description:
Returns a list of active security threats including:
- Failed login patterns
- Unauthorized access attempts
- SQL injection attempts
- XSS attempts
- Anomalous user activity

Results are ordered by severity (Critical first) and detection time (newest first).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 50, max: 100)

post.summary: Manually trigger replay of fallback audit events to database.
post.description:
Attempts to replay all pending fallback events from file storage to the database.
This should be called after database connectivity is restored.

Returns the number of successfully replayed events.

post.summary: Force garbage collection for a specific generation.
post.description:
**WARNING:** Forcing garbage collection can impact performance.

Use this endpoint sparingly and only when:
- Memory pressure is high
- During low-traffic periods
- For diagnostic purposes

Generation levels:
- 0: Collects short-lived objects (fastest)
- 1: Collects Gen0 and Gen1 objects
- 2: Full collection including all generations and LOH (slowest but most thorough)

parameters.name: generation
parameters.description: GC generation to collect (0, 1, or 2). Default is 2 (full collection).

parameters.name: blocking
parameters.description: Whether to wait for GC to complete. Default is true.

parameters.name: compacting
parameters.description: Whether to compact the heap. Default is true.

post.summary: Trigger memory optimization strategies including garbage collection and heap compaction.
post.description:
**WARNING:** This operation can temporarily impact performance.

Performs the following optimizations:
- Forces a full garbage collection (Gen2) with heap compaction
- Compacts the Large Object Heap (LOH)
- Trims the working set (Windows only)

Use this endpoint during low-traffic periods or when memory pressure is high.

post.summary: Detect SQL injection patterns in input text.
post.description:
Scans the input for common SQL injection patterns including:
- UNION statements
- SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE keywords
- Comment sequences (-- and /* */)
- String concatenation attempts

Returns a SecurityThreat if SQL injection pattern is detected.

requestBody.description: Input text to scan for SQL injection patterns

404.description: Not Found

post.summary: Detect XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) patterns in input text.
post.description:
Scans the input for common XSS patterns including:
- Script tags
- Event handlers (onclick, onerror, etc.)
- JavaScript protocol URLs
- Data URIs with scripts

Returns a SecurityThreat if XSS pattern is detected.

requestBody.description: Input text to scan for XSS patterns

404.description: Not Found

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme.

Enter your JWT token in the text input below.

Example: 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...'

**Note:** Do NOT include the 'Bearer ' prefix - it will be added automatically.

tags.name: Alerts
tags.description:
Controller for alert management operations.
Provides REST API endpoints for managing alert rules, viewing alert history,
acknowledging and resolving alerts, and configuring notification channels.
All endpoints require admin authorization.

tags.name: AuditHealth
tags.description:
Health check controller for audit logging system.
Provides visibility into audit logging health without blocking API requests.

tags.name: AuditLogs
tags.description:
Controller for audit logs management with legacy endpoint compatibility.
Provides comprehensive audit logging functionality including legacy endpoints that match logs.png interface.
Integrates with the existing ThinkOnErp authentication and authorization system.

tags.name: AuditTrail
tags.description:
Controller for managing audit trail access and export.
Provides endpoints for retrieving and exporting audit trail data for compliance and security monitoring.
All endpoints require AdminOnly authorization.
Validates Requirements 17.7-17.12 for audit trail access and compliance.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description:
Controller for authentication operations.
Handles user login and JWT token generation.

tags.name: Branch
tags.description:
Simplified controller for branch management operations with Base64 logo support.
Handles CRUD operations with logos integrated directly in JSON requests/responses.

tags.name: Company
tags.description:
Simplified controller for company management operations with Base64 logo support.
Provides exactly 4 endpoints: POST (create with logos), PUT (update with logo), DELETE, GET (with logos).
All logo operations are handled via Base64 strings in JSON requests/responses.

tags.name: Compliance
tags.description:
Controller for compliance reporting operations.
Provides REST API endpoints for generating GDPR, SOX, and ISO 27001 compliance reports.
Supports multiple export formats (PDF, CSV, JSON) for regulatory audit requirements.

tags.name: Configuration
tags.description:
Controller for managing ticket system configuration settings.
Provides endpoints for retrieving and updating various configuration categories.
All endpoints require AdminOnly authorization.

tags.name: Currency
tags.description:
Controller for currency management operations.
Handles CRUD operations for system currencies with appropriate authorization.

tags.name: FiscalYear
tags.description:
Controller for fiscal year management operations.
Handles CRUD operations for fiscal years with appropriate authorization.

tags.name: Health
tags.description:
Health check controller for monitoring system status and circuit breaker states.
Implements Requirement 18.9

tags.name: KeyManagement
tags.description:
Controller for managing encryption and signing keys.
Provides endpoints for key rotation, validation, and status monitoring.

tags.name: Monitoring
tags.description:
Controller for system monitoring endpoints including performance, memory, health, and security metrics.
Provides real-time insights into system resource usage, performance characteristics, and security threats.

tags.name: Permissions
tags.description:
Controller for permission management operations.
Handles permission checks, role assignments, and screen permissions.

tags.name: Roles
tags.description:
Controller for role management operations.
Handles CRUD operations for system roles with appropriate authorization.

tags.name: SavedSearches
tags.description:
Controller for saved search management operations.
Handles CRUD operations for user-defined saved searches.
Requirements: 8.6, 8.11, 19.9

tags.name: SuperAdmin
tags.description: Controller for Super Admin management operations

tags.name: Tickets
tags.description:
Controller for ticket management operations.
Handles CRUD operations, assignments, status updates, comments, and attachments.

tags.name: TicketTypes
tags.description:
Controller for ticket type management operations.
Handles CRUD operations for ticket types with AdminOnly authorization.

tags.name: Users
tags.description:
Controller for user management operations.
Handles CRUD operations for system users with appropriate authorization.
